//: PUBLISH build (PKG-03). Emits the artifact from src ONLY — never the test tree — rooted at
//rootDir: src so output is dist/index.js, not dist/src/index.js. Declarations ON; source and
//maps: declaration maps OFF (a shipped map would dangle against un-shipped source or leak an
//leak: absolute local path). The default tsconfig.json still compiles src+test for typecheck.
